g.text: Climb down to Coll and the skiff.
Slip into the water at the drop.
Run the open main cut, low and fast.
Cross over the watched third bridge.
Go around it into the open lane.
Chance the low sluice as the bell tolls.
Cut yourself free and glide up calm.
Ease the chain link by link.
Haul the chain fast and hard.
Cross past the silent hound to the main ...
Search the outbuildings for another way.
Wait for the clerk to move off.
Slip past behind the writing clerk.
Hug the wall past the hound's chain.
Lose yourself among the record offices.
Time the dark and cross on his turn.
Hurry across now, in his light.
Climb over the top of the stack.
Leave the coin and move on.
Read the tide-lock and work the wards in...
Force the door with your pry-bar.
Try the counting-ledger for the door's c...
Ease off and pick the wards instead.
Throw your weight on the bar.
Turn it the plain way the ledger reads.
Turn for the water with the cut.
Choose the way back to the water.
Out the coal hatch to the side canal.
Cut through the canal warren below.
Duck the drowned bars as before.
Jump the gap to the next roof.
Take the smuggler's cut under the road.
Come out by the Drowned Oak.
Keep to the basin's shadowed rim.
Cut straight across the open basin.
Run the pipe now, ahead of the tide.
Wait for the patrol, then run it.
Board and push off with the whole cut.
Ditch the heavy strongbox, keep the ledg...
Sink the whole take and go clean before ...
Press to the end of it.
